articles.author: Kevin Breuninger
articles.title: Trump threatens 100% tariff on countries putting 'Digital Services Tax on American Companies' - CNBC
articles.description: "This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made with the Country, whether implemented, signed, or not," President Donald Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.
articles.content:
President Donald Trump on Friday threatened to impose a "100% TARIFF" on the goods of any country that imposes a digital services tax on U.S. companies.
"This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made … [+1599 chars]
